0: TEZT-SPATIAL — battery 1 of the zand test suite, exercising the core shapes against test-spatial-floor3.json (a floor-3 ztone block). Each branch carries a call and the canonical zand response. Nine tests cover whole, spindle (4 lengths), disc (2 pscales), ring, directory. Spec anchors per sunztone:3 and whetztone:2/3 — pscale = floor − depth (so on a floor-3 block, root sits at pscale +3, the floor voicing at pscale 0, and a depth-5 position at pscale −2). Walk-with-empty: every digit produces a chain entry tagged voiced, headless, or absent; no halt on missing structure. Discs include voicing strings of branches at the target depth as separate positions. Run via run-tezt.py.

1.0: Whole-block read. No number, no attention.
1.2: Mode=whole, floor=3. Returns the entire JSON tree intact. Contains every named position: THORNKEEP, TAVERN, KITCHEN, HEARTH, BELLOWS, ASH PIT, POT-HOOK, IRON CHAIN, STOVE, COMMON ROOM, MARKET, FISHMONGER, HEADLAND, LIGHTHOUSE, LAMP ROOM, FLOOR TERMINUS, AT-FLOOR-VIA-ZERO-SPINE.

2.0: Walk-with-empty. Bare '100' on floor 3 walks 1,0,0 — no trailing-zero strip. Spindle has 4 entries (root + 3 walk steps) with statuses voiced, voiced, voiced, absent. THORNKEEP appears at entries 1 (collected zero-text from branch root[1]) and 2 (the THORNKEEP string at root[1][0]); entry 3 is absent because the walk overshoots THORNKEEP-the-string.
2.2: Mode=spindle, 4 entries. Pscales 3,2,1,0. Status sequence: voiced (FLOOR TERMINUS via zero-spine collection from root), voiced (THORNKEEP via branch), voiced (THORNKEEP string), absent.

3.0: Three-digit walk reaching the floor. Bare '123' walks 1,2,3 on floor 3 — no padding, no strip; all entries voiced.
3.2: Mode=spindle, 4 entries. Pscales 3,2,1,0. All voiced: FLOOR TERMINUS, THORNKEEP, TAVERN, KITCHEN.

4.0: Walk below the floor. Dotted '123.4' has left=3 (=floor) right=1; walks 1,2,3,4 — one step below the floor.
4.2: Mode=spindle, 5 entries. Pscales 3,2,1,0,-1. All voiced: FLOOR TERMINUS, THORNKEEP, TAVERN, KITCHEN, HEARTH.

5.0: Deep walk below the floor. '123.473' walks 1,2,3,4,7,3 — three steps below floor.
5.2: Mode=spindle, 7 entries. Pscales 3,2,1,0,-1,-2,-3. All voiced: FLOOR TERMINUS, THORNKEEP, TAVERN, KITCHEN, HEARTH, POT-HOOK, IRON CHAIN.

6.0: Disc at the floor (pscale 0, depth 3). Returns all positions at depth 3 across the block — including the voicing strings of branches at that depth (TAVERN at root[1][2][0], MARKET at root[1][5][0], LIGHTHOUSE at root[3][1][0]). Per zand's emit-every-position convention.
6.2: Mode=disc, pscale=0, 9 nodes. Addresses and content: 0 (FLOOR TERMINUS), 8 (AT-FLOOR-VIA-ZERO-SPINE), 120 (TAVERN voicing), 123 (KITCHEN branch via zero-text), 127 (COMMON ROOM), 150 (MARKET voicing), 158 (FISHMONGER), 310 (LIGHTHOUSE voicing), 315 (LAMP ROOM).

7.0: Disc one below the floor (pscale -1, depth 4). Includes KITCHEN voicing string (at root[1][2][3][0]) as a depth-4 position alongside HEARTH (branch) and STOVE (leaf).
7.2: Mode=disc, pscale=-1, 3 nodes: 123.0 (KITCHEN voicing string), 123.4 (HEARTH branch via zero-text), 123.5 (STOVE).

8.0: Spindle plus attention shallower than terminus → ring at attention's level. attention=1 (depth 2); parent of the ring is root[1] (depth 1); siblings are root[1]'s digit children at depth 2. The walked sibling at this depth is '2' (TAVERN's branch).
8.2: Mode=ring, pscale=1, 3 siblings: 0 (THORNKEEP voicing, branch), 2 (TAVERN, walked, branch), 5 (MARKET voicing, branch).

9.0: Spindle plus attention deeper than terminus → directory rooted at terminus, truncated to attention's depth. terminus is root[1][2][3] at depth 3; target depth 5 (attention=-2); descend 2 levels below terminus.
9.2: Mode=directory, subtree rooted at root[1][2][3] (KITCHEN branch). Top-level keys 0,4,5; the [4] subbranch (HEARTH) is descended one more level showing children BELLOWS, ASH PIT, and POT-HOOK (truncated to zero-text at the level boundary). Six named entities in the subtree: KITCHEN, HEARTH, BELLOWS, ASH PIT, POT-HOOK, STOVE. IRON CHAIN is beyond the level boundary.
